Why Choose Brisbane’s Leading Roofers?

Roo Roofing has generations of experience in providing Specialist Roof Replacements and general Roofing and Building Services to Brisbane and its surrounds. Roo Roofing can provide either a Total Roof Replacement, Roof Repair, Patio or a Loving Roof Restoration. We are experts at replacing or rejuvenating tired, dull, faded or rusting roofs and adding value and protection to your home, commercial building or industrial building. Because Roo Roofing has been based in Brisbane for so long, we have the understanding of the local conditions necessary to provide your Roof, Gutters, Fascia and Soffits with the best care.

Do you require a full roof replacement roof or have a leaking roof and are you in need of a roof repair? Then contact us today and we will send a qualified tradesman around to provide you with a free assessment and quote on your roofing and associated building needs.

Your roof is your main defence in keeping your family, possessions and home safe from the harsh Australian weather. A quality roof replacement can transform the appearance of your home instantly, adding significant value to your house for years to come. At Roo Roofing, we only use the most materials with qualified and skilled tradesmen, so you can rest easy knowing that your roof will not only look great but will stay in good condition in the future. We’re so confident that we provide up to 10 years of installation warranty and provide manufacturer warranties of up to 36 years for your peace of mind with all roof replacement works.

Frequently Asked Questions

Why is Roo Roofing considered one of the best roofing companies in Brisbane?

Roo Roofing is a trusted Brisbane roofing company known for quality workmanship, honest advice, and long-lasting results. With extensive local experience across Brisbane roofing repairs, roof restorations, and roof replacements, our licensed roofers deliver reliable solutions tailored to Queensland homes. We focus on clear communication, durable materials, and workmanship you can rely on.

Do you provide roof repairs across Brisbane and the Southside?

Yes. Roo Roofing provides professional roof repairs in Brisbane, including the Brisbane Southside and surrounding suburbs. Whether you need urgent leak repairs, storm damage repairs, or general roofing repairs, our local roof repairers respond quickly to protect your home and prevent further damage.

What roofing services does Roo Roofing offer?

Roo Roofing offers a full range of Brisbane roofing services, including:
Roof repairs
Roof restorations
Roof replacements
Metal (Colorbond) and tiled roofing
Guttering and roof maintenance
As experienced Brisbane roofers, we work on residential and select commercial properties, delivering complete roofing solutions under one roof.

Should I choose roof restoration or roof replacement?

It depends on your roof’s condition. Roof restoration in Brisbane is ideal if your roof structure is sound but showing signs of wear, leaks, or fading. If your roof is severely damaged, rusted, or nearing the end of its lifespan, a roof replacement in Brisbane may be the better long-term investment. Roo Roofing provides honest inspections to help you choose the most cost-effective option.

How do I get a quote from a trusted Brisbane roofing company?

Getting started is easy. Contact Roo Roofing to book an inspection with an experienced roofer in Brisbane. We’ll assess your roof, explain your options clearly, and provide a detailed quote for roof repairs, roof restoration, or roof replacement with no pressure and no hidden surprises.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### [Why is Roo Roofing considered one of the best roofing companies in Brisbane?](https://www.rooroofing.com.au/\#why-is-roo-roofing-considered-one-of-the-best-roofing-companies-in-brisbane)

Roo Roofing is a trusted Brisbane roofing company known for quality workmanship, honest advice, and long-lasting results. With extensive local experience across Brisbane roofing repairs, roof restorations, and roof replacements, our licensed roofers deliver reliable solutions tailored to Queensland homes. We focus on clear communication, durable materials, and workmanship you can rely on.

### [Do you provide roof repairs across Brisbane and the Southside?](https://www.rooroofing.com.au/\#do-you-provide-roof-repairs-across-brisbane-and-the-southside)

Yes. Roo Roofing provides professional roof repairs in Brisbane, including the Brisbane Southside and surrounding suburbs. Whether you need urgent leak repairs, storm damage repairs, or general roofing repairs, our local roof repairers respond quickly to protect your home and prevent further damage.

### [What roofing services does Roo Roofing offer?](https://www.rooroofing.com.au/\#what-roofing-services-does-roo-roofing-offer)

Roo Roofing offers a full range of Brisbane roofing services, including:

Roof repairs

Roof restorations

Roof replacements

Metal (Colorbond) and tiled roofing

Guttering and roof maintenance

As experienced Brisbane roofers, we work on residential and select commercial properties, delivering complete roofing solutions under one roof.

### [Should I choose roof restoration or roof replacement?](https://www.rooroofing.com.au/\#should-i-choose-roof-restoration-or-roof-replacement)

It depends on your roof’s condition. Roof restoration in Brisbane is ideal if your roof structure is sound but showing signs of wear, leaks, or fading. If your roof is severely damaged, rusted, or nearing the end of its lifespan, a roof replacement in Brisbane may be the better long-term investment. Roo Roofing provides honest inspections to help you choose the most cost-effective option.

### [How do I get a quote from a trusted Brisbane roofing company?](https://www.rooroofing.com.au/\#how-do-i-get-a-quote-from-a-trusted-brisbane-roofing-company)

Getting started is easy. Contact Roo Roofing to book an inspection with an experienced roofer in Brisbane. We’ll assess your roof, explain your options clearly, and provide a detailed quote for roof repairs, roof restoration, or roof replacement with no pressure and no hidden surprises.

Roof Repairs Brisbane

The harsh sun and climate can do damage to your roof over time. Timely roof repairs maintains the beauty and strength of your home by solving problems before they get out of hand. A simple roof repair to fix a crack, seal or replace a flashing could prevent more severe issues longer-term, such as ‘roof leaks’ causing water damage.

Facias, Soffit & Carpentry Work

We believe a roof restoration is not complete without the right gutters, fascias & downpipes to compliment your roof. Roo Roofing has over 23 years of experience in providing Specialist Roofing Services to Brisbane and surrounds.

Fascia boards and downpipes add a finished look to your roof and promote a healthy roof system.

Roof Insulation Brisbane

Insulation acts as a barrier between different temperature zones, stopping or slowing the flow of heat. It helps your home remain cooler in summer and warmer in winter, resulting in less power required for temperature control.

Ventilation + Skylights

Ventilation is the process of reducing temperatures by replacing trapped hot air with cooler air from the outside. Roof Space temperatures during summer can reach in excess of 60°C and during the colder months, moisture from bathrooms and kitchens can build-up in roof space to form up to 12 litres of moisture.

Slope? Sheathing? Rafters? What are they talking about? They’re talking about roofs right? In this post we share some common roof terms and parts to help you have an understanding of how your roof is built. A well-built roof seals out water and directs it to gutters and downpipes, which carry away from the house. To perform at its best, the underlayment, flashings and the rowing material should be installed properly so that water can’t get in under and damage the sheathing.

Beautiful, big eyes stare at you and you can’t help but melt a little. But at the same time, you’re really tired. Exhausted might even be a more apt description. You’ve been up for the past few nights listening to the scurrying around in your roof and those eyes are exactly the source – can you guess what we’re talking about? Yep, possums. In this post, we share some ways to stop possum proof your roof without hurting them (remember they are a protected species).

A solid roof above your head means a warm, cozy, and leak-free home, but your roof suffers wear and tear over the years from being exposed to the elements such as sun, rain and wind, even with regular maintenance and repair, it’s inevitable that you roof will get to the point where it needs to be replaced. So, how do you know if your roof is at the point that it needs to be replaced? In this post, we look at some of the most common signs that your home needs to have a roof replacement.
